---
id: download-model-stream
title: "Download an STT model with NDJSON progress streaming."
description: "Streams progress events as NDJSON lines. If the model already exists,"

import MethodEndpoint from "@theme/ApiExplorer/MethodEndpoint";
import ParamsDetails from "@theme/ParamsDetails";
import RequestSchema from "@theme/RequestSchema";
import StatusCodes from "@theme/StatusCodes";
import OperationTabs from "@theme/OperationTabs";

import Heading from "@theme/Heading";
import Translate from "@docusaurus/Translate";

<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Download an STT model with NDJSON progress streaming."}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"post"}
  path={"/stt/models/download/stream"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Streams progress events as NDJSON lines. If the model already exists,
returns a single `complete` event. Returns 409 if a download is already in progress.

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
  className={"openapi-tabs__heading"}
>
  <Translate id="theme.openapi.request.title">Request</Translate>
</Heading>

  parameters={undefined}
>
  
</ParamsDetails>

>
  
</RequestSchema>

  {...require("./download-model-stream.StatusCodes.json")}
>
